title: The Minks Welcome Their Saviors
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the minks welcome their saviors within the The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We only realized after we had read...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: The day Jack left this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Was the day you all defeated Doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Jack left this country in order to save Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It seems the two are deeply connected.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: In other words, the ones who drove that monster out of this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I see! Well then that makes what happened soon after another, even more amazing miracle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's right! The day we arrived on Zou was the day after Doflamingo was defeated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm warning you...I'm against going ashore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Pipe down and carry us over there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I won't forget this, you bastards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This place is definitely under raid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm going to go scout the area inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: All I want is to crucifix and chill!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Did... Did that girl just talk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's the situation here? This guy's definitely the bad guy here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Which makes this girl the victim!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Brook! Teach them some manners please!

summary: The Minks Welcome Their Saviors: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
